glosses.mpenziwe: contraction of mpenzi + wake, literally “his/her lover.”
glosses.jinale: contraction of jina + lake, literally “his/her name.”
glosses.tuko kadi: An expression among Kenyan youth signifying registration for the 2027 elections.
glosses.niko kadi: An expression among Kenyan youth signifying registration for the 2027 elections.
glosses.fyatuliana: Reciprocal form of -fyatulia: to fire at each other
glosses.mlango wa bahari wa gibraltar: alternative form of Mlango-Bahari wa Gibraltar (“Strait of Gibraltar”)
glosses.mlango wa bahari wa malacca: alternative form of Mlango-Bahari wa Malacca (“Strait of Malacca”)
glosses.vaana: Reciprocal form of -vaa: to fight, to engage each other
glosses.mlango kizazi: alternative form of mlango wa kizazi (“cervix”)
glosses.mabadiliko ya tabianchi: alternative spelling of mabadiliko ya tabia nchi (“climate change”)
glosses.torosha: to make escape, flee, desert, run away with
glosses.kwa ajili: because of, for the sake of
glosses.minajili: because of, for the sake of, on account of
glosses.ziwa viktoria: alternative form of Ziwa Victoria (“Lake Victoria”)
glosses.kisiwa cha usingo: Usingo Island (an island in lake Lake Victoria in Kenya)
glosses.kisiwa cha migingo: Migingo Island (an island in lake Lake Victoria in Kenya)
